scenario: Clean codebase — zero violations after formatting and linting
expected_behavior: Skill runs formatter and linter, reports Status: PASS; outputs 'Zero Violations Confirmed' with checkmarks; proceeds to /s5-audit-rules
notes: Greenfield scenario — no CRITICAL issues, no auto-fix needed

expected_behavior: Skill runs formatter, auto-fixes 14 files with Prettier, then runs linter; reports Status: DONE; proceeds to /s5-audit-rules
notes: Formatting is prerequisite — must complete before linting

expected_behavior: Skill detects CRITICAL: 'Forbidden any type at src/api.ts:23 (RULES.md §3)'; blocks handoff to /s5-audit-rules until fixed
notes: CRITICAL violations cannot be auto-fixed and must block

scenario: SAST finding — SQL injection in raw query
expected_behavior: Skill runs semgrep, detects HIGH SQL injection; flags CRITICAL: 'semgrep: SQL injection vector'; blocks handoff
notes: HIGH/CRITICAL SAST findings are always blocking

expected_behavior: Skill detects WARNING; can auto-fix by removing unused import; reports in Auto-Fixed section; does not block
notes: WARNINGs are reported but do not block unless CRITICAL issues remain

scenario: Multiple issues — mixed CRITICAL and WARNINGs
expected_behavior: Skill auto-fixes WARNINGs, reports CRITICAL issue as blocker; Status: BLOCKED; requires manual fix before proceeding
notes: Presence of any CRITICAL blocks handoff regardless of WARNING count
